void cfd_flux_kernel(float result[SIZE * NVAR], float elements_surrounding_elements [SIZE * NNB], float normals [SIZE * NNB * NDIM], float variables [SIZE * NVAR], float fc_momentum_x [SIZE * NDIM], float fc_momentum_y [SIZE * NDIM], float fc_momentum_z [SIZE * NDIM], float fc_density_energy [SIZE * NDIM]);

add_files -tb ./02142/tb_hls_cosim.cpp
open_solution "solution1"
set_part {"xc7z020clg400-1"}
create_clock -period 10 -name default
csim_design
csynth_design
cosim_design -rtl verilog -coverage -trace_level all
exit
